warnings: Downtime_minutes is represented using case-open to case-resolved/closed elapsed time and may overstate true production downtime.
Supporting RMS and work-order screenshots include garbled or low-quality OCR; detailed field values were not relied on where unclear.
Source contains ACB/ECB naming inconsistency that should be SME-reviewed.
unsupported_claims_removed: Removed any direct root-cause assertion that low battery or mapping definitively caused the incident.
Removed personal names from canonical narrative and retrieval text.
Did not include exact work-order identifiers, phone numbers, or vendor details from low-quality OCR.
notes: Primary incident facts were taken from page OCR and Salesforce case screenshots.
Resolution summary is framed as source-reported recovery, not independently proven root cause.
